title: 荣誉附件正文｜LOA Combine（第8部分）
content:
oval.

Staff Not allowable Recruitment and Related Costs Examples of such expenses are advertising and recruitment agency costs, staff relocation and settling-in allowances. Exception: employment pass application is allowable but dependent pass is not. Staff Insurance Not allowable, except for SUTD Group Insurance Temasek Laboratories @ SUTD Page 2 Circular – Temasek Lab Grants Date: April 2018 Type of Description Expenses Transfer of Allowable Manpower to another project Please complete and submit the TL Manpower transfer form to TL office. Prior approval from TL Director is required. PI is fully responsible for the staff he/she hired (even after transferring the staff to another project grant). The PI must fulfil his contractual terms, specifically with regards to the pro-rated completion bonus at the end of the transferred staff’s employment contract. Student Allowable Assistants, Student Helpers To request for approval from TL Director prior to engaging the students. and Internships The engagement will be on a temporary basis and for the intended project only. PIs are to justify the need for such engagements. Visiting Students Allowable To request for approval from TL Director prior to inviting the visiting students. PIs are required to justify that the visiting students’ presence are necessary and relevant to the area of their research. The visiting students should be based locally (i. e. locals or studying in a local institution) and their remuneration will be based on Office of Human Resources (HR) guidelines. Temasek Laboratories @ SUTD Page 3 Circular – Temasek Lab Grants Date: April 2018 Type of Description Expenses Visiting Allowable Professors / Researchers to For honorarium (this includes meals, transportation and / or any other SUTD miscellaneous expenses incurred) and travel-related expenses (ie. airfare and accommodation). The Visiting Professor / Researcher must be identified and his / her contribution to the research activities that the TL Research Grant intended to support must be clearly defined and described for the approval of such reimbursements. PIs should adhere to HR’s visitor policy at all times. Budget for Visiting Professors and Researchers to SUTD must be taken from Visits and Events vote. TL Visiting form must be completed and submitted for approval. Subject to TL director’s approval. As far as possible, the Visiting Professors should be housed on campus accommodation and are encouraged to give a talk to the SUTD community to showcase their work. Please refer to the University’s policy on Visiting Professors in SUTD Central under Human of Resources (HR). Conference and Travel Related Expenses Funding Limit Capped at S$8,000 per year, per track. Regardless of overseas or local usage. Prior approval from TL Director is required. Overseas Allowable Conferences (strictly for For PIs and his / her research staff hired under the grant and matriculated conference only) SUTD students, if the overseas conference is directly relevant to the research that the grant intended to support and contributes to meeting the deliverables. Support for overseas collaborators, visiting researchers and visiting students are NOT allowed.
